column1: A single control plane for the entire business. All data flows from the same source of truth in Firestore / BigQuery.
• Real-time view of bookings, queue, and staff load
• Configure services, pricing, working hours per location
• Launch “fill empty slots”, “reward regulars” campaigns via Gmail

column3: > Decisions, not dashboards Gemini doesn’t just show charts – it outputs concrete actions: open slots, call back list, who to reward.

Zero dashboard complexity. Three actions only – scan, start, complete – and quick notes that enrich history.
• Each scan updates queue, loyalty and visit history in Firestore
• Status is reflected instantly in owner dashboard and Calendar
• Latency kept low via Firebase + Cloud Run

column3: > AI assist on the floor Gemini prompts staff: “Offer upgrade”, “Check allergy note”, “Suggest follow-up in 4 weeks”.
